auditConclusion: DM1 V2 is not verified as complete. Verified percentage is not verifiable from current repo evidence; do not report 100%.

completionClaim.reason: Existing evidence verifies several V2 scaffolds/gates but does not define a complete percentage model or prove the DM1 V2 definition-of-done. The completion matrix gate inventories modules and required current gates; it explicitly says it does not claim V2 is done.

missingOrUnprovenLanes: Phase 0 completion-matrix ownership for every non-orphan V2 module is not fully enforced by the current tool.
Phase 1 V2 launcher/preview headless launch-smoke is not proven by current V2 gates.
Phase 2 turning/collision/door interaction and full source-locked movement-camera semantics are incomplete or unproven.
Phase 3 viewport materials, distance-row composition, clipping, lighting/fog and draw-order gates are incomplete or unproven.
Phase 4 HUD/champion panels/interaction/touch-zone route equivalence gates are absent.
Phase 5 creature, item, spell and effect render gates are absent.
Phase 6 settings, persistence, package smoke, and V1 regression proof for V2 release are absent.

observedInventory.v2LogicalCatalog: 8 categories / 45 logical IDs / 4 manifest bindings / 3 source-evidence bindings

verifiedPassingGates: scripts/validate_v2_logical_catalog.py required shared UI bindings/source-evidence: passed
